title: 2nd Impact Sound
wikitext:
[]: 2nd Impact Sound?             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Mar 04, 2012 11:01 pm Not sure if this was ever mentioned, search isn't finding anything so... Was listening to this http://www.astronomycast.com/2011/11/ep-237-spooky-sounds-from-space/ Apperently the aurorae on Saturn (at least when processed for human ears) sound like Adam going 2nd Impact wav link to saturn: http://www.nasa.gov/wav/123163main_cas-skr1-112203.wav 2nd Impact: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VoqQenQ9C7Q#t=2m NASA's page http://www.nasa.gov/mission_pages/cassini/multimedia/pia07966.html

[]:             Quote Post by Tribblepoo » Sun Mar 04, 2012 11:09 pm That is the same sound definitely. The clip used for 2I is too short for it to be considered the producers thought it sounded "otherworldly". Something tells me there is a deliberate connection here. To what is the question. The most obvious would be a connection between Adam and the Roman goddess Saturn. I think this deserves looking into.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sun Mar 04, 2012 11:58 pm I'd be careful on the connection, they do sound alike but Cassini recorded that sound in 2002 like it's said in the NASA page, were there similar recordings in 1995?

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Mon Mar 05, 2012 1:15 am Whatever it is, it's a stock sound effect that I've heard in a few different films. As far as I can tell, NGE uses nothing but stock sound so I wouldn't put too much meaning behind it.

[]:             Quote Post by User-iel » Mon Mar 05, 2012 3:25 am @ TMBounty_Hunter Thanks for an interesting idea, and there is similarity between these recordings. I suspect that the largest part of the similarity is due to the human choices in processing. And my correlary to that, is the assertion that the 2I sounds are studio-manufactured imitations of this: [url]http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Whistler_(radio)[/url] Natural phenomenon. Antarctica almost does sound this way IRL. But only infrequently, and as VLF signal radiation. If one were to light the place up with arbitrary terawattage and AATF stuff, the atmosphere might sing it's song very much like that. [url]http://www.antarctica2000.net/palmer/journal10/1_20_00.html[/url] [url]http://www.spaceweathersounds.com/sndbites.htm[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Mar 05, 2012 2:45 pm When an Impact happens and everyone is obliterated to LCL in the very picosecond it occurs, does it make a sound?

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Mon Mar 05, 2012 5:03 pm Tribblepoo wrote: To what is the question. The most obvious would be a connection between Adam and the Roman Titan, Saturn. I think this deserves looking into.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Mon Mar 05, 2012 5:09 pm Warren Peace wrote: so I wouldn't put too much meaning behind it.

[]:             Quote Post by Tribblepoo » Mon Mar 05, 2012 11:49 pm gatotsu911 wrote: GET THE FUCK OUT, YOU DON'T BELONG HERE
